calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Jun-22-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ed Koplowitz for and with Michelle Mitchell. Brandon Blevans for William Ruehle (Objector/Interested Party). Jerome Marks for and with Judy Rees (Trustee).

Counsel presented further argument to support their positions with regard to the same issues raised at the June 8th hearing. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

Mindy Ross for Judi Ruehle Rees in the Family Law matter in San Mateo County was also present.

Joinder Of Beneficiary M. Mitchell In Petition Of Judi Rees For Instructions.
Off Calendar Jun-22-2011 Text Ruling

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Jun-08-2011 Continued To Jun-15-11 At 02:30 P.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ed Koplowitz for and with Michelle Mitchell. Brandon Blevans for William Ruehle. Jerome Marks for and with Judy Rees (Trustee). Mindy Ross for Judi Ruehle Rees in the Family Law matter in San Mateo County.

Consel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to this Court having exclusive jurisdiction over the Trust, whether the Court has anything to decide, why the dissolution matter in San Mateo County is affected by what this Court does in the Trust, why the Court may/may not decline to act, why no other Court should decide any litigation issues in the Trust, the issue of Judy's right to revoke/terminate the Trust, etc. Ms. Ross spoke of the San Mateo County family law mattter. The Petition for Instructions was continued to June 15, 2011 at 2:30 p.m., in Dept. 204 for further argument.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Bui.

Joinder Of Beneficiary M. Mitchell In Petition Of Judi Rees For Instructions.
Off Calendar Jun-08-2011 Continued To Jun-15-11 At 02:30 P.M. In Dept 204
